package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "compress/gzip"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_created_per_small_payload: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag gzip writers created for tiny payloads where compression overhead can dominate.
type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayload(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationGzipWriterCreatedPerSmallPayloadDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_serialization_gzip"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        var compressed bytes.Buffer
        writer := gzip.NewWriter(&compressed)
        _, _ = writer.Write(item.Payload)
        _ = writer.Close()
    }
    perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "serialization": 3, "gzip": 4, "writer": 5, "created": 6}
    perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    serialization_positive_2 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["serialization"] + len(input)
    _ = serialization_positive_2
    gzip_positive_3 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["gzip"] + len(input)
    _ = gzip_positive_3
    writer_positive_4 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["writer"] + len(input)
    _ = writer_positive_4
    created_positive_5 := perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_positive["created"] + len(input)
    _ = created_positive_5
    return nil
}
